data.title: Nansen introduces AI crypto trading tools on Base and Solana, using natural language processing for execution.
data.description: The latest crypto trading platforms, powered by artificial intelligence, strive to revolutionize traditional trading methods by providing trading execution using natural language processing. These platforms aim to streamline the trading process by eliminating the need for traditional trading charts and order books. The technology behind these platforms allows investors to engage in trading activities using human-like communication rather than technical analysis. This advancement is expected to attract a significant number of users looking for a more intuitive and user-friendly trading experience.

data.title: Economist predicts shift to small-cap, value stocks driven by economic resilience. Large growth stocks drop 10-12% in latest rotation. Fed policy and earnings momentum support new market trend.
data.description: Investors are focusing beyond inflated headlines, leading a significant shift in the market. Professor Jeremy Siegel notes a sustainable trend towards small-cap and value stocks, driven by economic resilience and Federal Reserve policy. This shift is evident as there is a noticeable move away from large growth stocks, with a 10% to 12% pullback in large-cap growth relative to value stocks. Professor Siegel believes this rotation is more enduring than previous fluctuations. Small-cap stocks are gaining momentum, with Siegel stating that they don't need substantial earnings growth to perform well. He emphasizes that as long as earnings stabilize and the Fed continues its current direction, small-caps are poised for leadership in the market. The resilience of the market is overcoming inflationary distractions, paving the way for a healthier market advancement. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Acer introduces Chromebooks for students with MediaTek Kompanio 540 Processor, featuring up to 15 hours of battery life.
data.description: The latest Acer Chromebook Spin 311 and Acer Chromebook 311 offer impressive performance along with a remarkable battery life of up to 15 hours. These devices serve as an excellent tool for students, providing a solid platform for learning, creating, and collaborating. The new Acer Chromebooks are known for their compact design, reliability, and feature a wide variety of capabilities.

data.title: MOZN named a leader in AML and KYC solutions by Chartis, one of only 10 worldwide, per its RiskTech® Quadrant 2025.
data.description: Today, MOZN, an enterprise AI company, declared its recognition as a Category Leader in Chartis Research's RiskTech® Quadrant 2025 for AML Transaction Monitoring Solutions and KYC Data and Solutions. The announcement was made in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia and London on January 21, 2026. This recognition highlights MOZN's expertise in anti-money laundering and know-your-customer solutions.

data.title: Kanazawa University researchers discover how lung cancer drugs change proteins' shape, behavior, impacting cancer treatment.
data.description: In Kanazawa, Japan, on January 21, 2026, a team of researchers at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) and the Cancer Research Institute at Kanazawa University have revealed the impact of targeted lung cancer drugs on a crucial cancer-promoting protein. This discovery sheds light on the alterations in shape and behavior induced by the drugs, offering new insights into combating lung cancer.

data.title: Iceblue Global names Mary Ann Rose as Chief Revenue Officer.Leading connectivity ecosystem.
data.description: Iceblue Global, a global company based in London and Boston, has recently appointed Mary Ann Rose as its new Chief Revenue Officer. This strategic move aims to leverage Rose's expertise in driving revenue growth and maximizing profitability. With this appointment, Iceblue Global seeks to enhance its connectivity ecosystem and propel its revenue generation to new heights.

data.title: IZA partners with Pharmanova to provide zinc treatments for children in Zambia, collaboration celebrated in Lusaka.
data.description: In Lusaka, Zambia, Zinc Saves Kids, a child-health initiative by the International Zinc Association, has partnered with Pharmanova Zambia Limited, a top pharmaceutical manufacturer in the country, to increase availability of vital zinc treatments for children in Zambia. The official partnership was marked at an event in Lusaka attended by the Zambian Ministry of Health, Pharmanova Zambia Limited, and IZA. This alliance aims to improve access to life-saving zinc treatments for children in Zambia, furthering the efforts to enhance child health in the region.

data.title: Plaid names Shawn Babcock COO on Jan 20, 2026. Firm is Plaid Technologies Inc. (CSE: STIF), (OTC: STIFF), (FRA: 5QX0).
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 21, 2026, Plaid Technologies Inc. (CSE: STIF) (OTC: STIFF) (FRA: 5QX0) revealed the appointment of Shawn Babcock as the new Chief Operating Officer, starting from January 20, 2026.

data.title: ESA member states are providing €73 million ($84.8 million) to SWISSto12 for HummingSat project to meet demand for communications satellites.
data.description: In Renens, Switzerland, SWISSto12 has reported receiving a substantial €73 million ($84.8 million) in funding from ESA member states as part of the HummingSat ARTES partnership project.

data.title: Ageneau Group selects Generix WMS to enhance expansion, improve efficiency. #logistics #supplychain #technology
data.description: Yesterday, it was reported that the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling by over 500 points. The S&P 500 also saw a decrease of around 2%. This downturn was attributed to concerns about inflation and rising interest rates. Tech stocks were particularly hard hit, with the NASDAQ dropping by more than 3%. Investors are keeping a close eye on these developments as they continue to assess the market situation and its potential impact on their portfolios.
